task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 06-T-001 Chiller serial number verification required

abstract.p: You received this trigger on your work list because the chiller serial number in this printer is required for the Pro-care contract administration.
This information is currently missing, incorrect, or a duplicate exists.
Please check if the correct serial number is set in SDS!
No extra visit is required for this action.
It should be combined with a regular service visit.

li.p: Try to combine this action with other tasks during a visit.

section.title: How to act
section.p: Locate the chiller serial number: 06 The location of the serial number of the chiller (V2)
Enter the chiller serial number in SDS test 06-1-003: 06-1-003 The serial number of the chiller [Parameters] (V2)
The Chiller serial number is stored during manufacturing (From C1650 S/N 9902001051) but might get lost, incorrect, or duplicated:
No triggers will be sent out.

li.p: Installation without keep settings will result in chiller serial number information lost !
Updating the chiller serial number is required in case of replacement.
Swapping Chillers between systems might result in duplicated chiller serial numbers.
